title: NIMASA Discuss Maritime Security Issues in the Gulf Of Guinea
description: The General  Director General, Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency (NIMASA), Dr. Bashir Jamoh and Deputy Chief of Mission and Consul General Philippine Embassy Roderico Atienza, shortly
html: The General  Director General, Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency (NIMASA), Dr. Bashir Jamoh and Deputy Chief of Mission and Consul General Philippine Embassy Roderico Atienza, shortly after a session to discuss Maritime Security issues in the Gulf of Guinea.
